ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the district */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the district's contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the district's contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the district's contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate of the truck */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the truck in tons */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the truck */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the truck (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the truck */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the truck was manufactured */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the truck */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission used in the truck */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the truck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck that made the trip */,
  "district_origin" TEXT /* Origin district of the trip */,
  "district_destination" TEXT /* Destination district of the trip */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the trip in miles */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in hours */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of cargo carried during the trip in tons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip during which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., fuel stop, traffic congestion) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_events_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truck_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck movement record */,
  "district_origin" TEXT /* Origin district of the trucks */,
  "district_destination" TEXT /* Destination district of the trucks */,
  "total_trucks" REAL /* Total number of trucks used for the movement */,
  "trucks_AM" REAL /* Number of trucks used in the morning */,
  "trucks_MD" REAL /* Number of trucks used at midday */,
  "trucks_PM" REAL /* Number of trucks used in the evening */,
  "trucks_NT" REAL /* Number of trucks used at night */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the truck movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_movements_district_origin FOREIGN KEY ("district_origin") REFERENCES districts ("district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_movements_district_destination FOREIGN KEY ("district_destination") REFERENCES districts ("district_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic record */,
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the truck movement being analyzed */,
  "morning_usage" REAL /* Usage statistics for the morning */,
  "midday_usage" REAL /* Usage statistics for the midday */,
  "evening_usage" REAL /* Usage statistics for the evening */,
  "night_usage" REAL /* Usage statistics for the night */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_movement_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_id") REFERENCES truck_movements ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the truck that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck from which the GPS data was collected */,
  "gps_time" TEXT /* Time at which the GPS data was recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the truck's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the truck's location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the truck at the time of data collection */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the truck at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)
